content: what is the "meta" team anyways?

Use the coral wheel, dupe it with adventurer wheel, your opponent takes 18 bleed everytime one of your awakers dies.
if you're stuck with standard banner, build a jenkins team
or roll for sorel's wheel rn and build helot
You have Tawil so you can netdeck a Jenkins team. Here's the core.

Gdoll wheel is so strong
Even if it doesnt deny strike aliemus
Its a -13
And just hitting it once with a backline will make you ult slower by a turn
its definitely a bummer for ult focused comps
ive been playing strike nuke and havent really had problems

the only reason im not rating it higher is cause its so easy to avoid the effect on someone influential

if you can ult you can just ult before hitting and if you cant then its not that bad if enemy hits you with enough dmg to make up the 13 next turn on a less influential unit
i just dont see this as being stronger than whatever people already put
if youre playing helot cleave and youre hitting the first hit with helot youre just screwing yourself over

use pandia buff 24 use 24 strike card at full power
you can counter with analysis of death wheel, nuking their dps (24 in this case), paralysis, gunshot posse, etc
entangle and weak will also halve their dmg on that turn if you have
and you can dispel charge if they use it early

if youre entering the 1.5k rank area generally your comp needs to at least be able to kill one opponent by turn 5 or be able to delay opponent/defend til turn 7/8 and win
